creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: beat->sbz

Exp-runs finished: 
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-9-exp-latest 
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-8-exp-latest 

The first exp-run on 9-exp had some unrelated ghostscript failures so 
I've stared a second one on 8-exp. The result looks ok but please review 
them too. Please note that an exp-run doesn't run the 
upgrade-site-packages target so this functionality wasn't tested.
